ast.target: 与外部应用程序集成（仅限桌面端）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You can specify the default folder in the

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 中指定默认文件夹。点击

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: When enabled, the PDF viewer will zoom to fit the rectangular selection when you open a link to it. Otherwise, the viewer will keep the current zoom level.
ast.target: 启用后，当您打开指向它的链接时，PDF 查看器将缩放以适应矩形选区。否则，查看器将保持当前的缩放级别。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You need to reopen PDF viewers after changing this option. Note that you can achieve the same thing (and even more advanced stuff) using
ast.target: 更改此选项后需要重新打开 PDF 查看器。请注意，您可以使用

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 实现相同的功能（甚至更高级的功能）。如果

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: is enabled, it will be prioritized and the context menu will not be shown.
ast.target: 已启用，它将被优先处理，并且不会显示上下文菜单。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 更改此设置后，请重新加载插件以使其生效。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Reopen tabs or reload the app after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后，请重新打开标签页或重新加载应用。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Also note that on mobile devices, the action performed by "Copy" depends on the
ast.target: 另请注意，在移动设备上，“复制”执行的操作取决于

ast.name: log
ast.source: add text node as child of
ast.target: 将文本节点添加为子节点

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: Create [callouts](https://help.obsidian.md/Editing+and+formatting/Callouts) with the same color as the highlight color without any CSS snippet scripting.
ast.target: 创建与高亮颜色相同的[标注](https://help.obsidian.md/Editing+and+formatting/Callouts)，无需任何 CSS 代码片段脚本。

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: The "Hover Editor" option is available if the [Hover Editor](obsidian://show-plugin?id=obsidian-hover-editor) plugin is enabled.
ast.target: 如果启用了[悬浮编辑器](obsidian://show-plugin?id=obsidian-hover-editor)插件，则“悬浮编辑器”选项可用。

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: Use [modifier keys](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Tabs#Open+a+link) to open PDF internal links in various ways
ast.target: 使用[修饰键](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Tabs#Open+a+link)以不同方式打开 PDF 内部链接

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: Click PDF outline with [modifier keys](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Tabs#Open+a+link) to open target section in various ways
ast.target: 使用[修饰键](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Tabs#Open+a+link)点击 PDF 大纲以不同方式打开目标章节

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: Click PDF thumbnails with [modifier keys](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Tabs#Open+a+link) to open target page in various ways
ast.target: 使用[修饰键](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Tabs#Open+a+link)点击 PDF 缩略图以不同方式打开目标页面

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: This option will be ignored when you press [modifier keys](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Use+tabs+in+Obsidian#Open+a+link) to explicitly specify how to open the link.
ast.target: 当您按下[修饰键](https://help.obsidian.md/User+interface/Use+tabs+in+Obsidian#Open+a+link)明确指定如何打开链接时，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: renderMarkdown
ast.source: Improve the built-in [backlinks pane](https://help.obsidian.md/Plugins/Backlinks) for better PDF experience.
ast.target: 改进内置的[反向链接窗格](https://help.obsidian.md/Plugins/Backlinks)，以获得更好的 PDF 体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can choose a color from the color picker or select one from your custom named colors.
ast.target: 您可以从颜色选择器中选择颜色，或从您的自定义命名颜色中选择一种。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This PDF document does not have any page labels.
ast.target: 此 PDF 文档没有任何页面标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The index of the first page in this range.
ast.target: 此范围中第一页的索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The index of the last page in this range.
ast.target: 此范围中最后一页的索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the external PDF is located.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type the path in the input box or click the "Browse" button to select the file.
ast.target: 在输入框中输入路径，或点击“浏览”按钮选择文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If you find PDF++ helpful, please consider supporting the development to help me keep this plugin alive.

If you prefer PayPal, please make donations via Ko-fi. Thank you!
ast.target: 如果您觉得PDF++有帮助，请考虑支持开发，帮助我维持这个插件的运营。\n\n如果您偏好使用PayPal，请通过Ko-fi进行捐赠。谢谢！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: It must contain at least one character in order to make annotations referenceable & editable within Obsidian.
ast.target: 必须包含至少一个字符，以便在Obsidian中使注释可引用和可编辑。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Annotate PDF files with highlights just by linking to text selection. You can easily copy links to selections using color palette in the toolbar. See the "Color palette" section for the details.
ast.target: 只需链接到文本选择即可高亮标注PDF文件。您可以使用工具栏中的调色板轻松复制选择链接。详情请参阅“调色板”部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In the PDF viewer, any referenced text will be highlighted for easy identification.
ast.target: 在PDF查看器中，任何被引用的文本都会被高亮显示，以便于识别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How backlinks to a text selection should be visualized.
ast.target: 文本选择的反向链接应如何可视化显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn this on if you want to open markdown files in a single pane in the sidebar.
ast.target: 如果您希望在侧边栏的单个窗格中打开Markdown文件，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If some notes are opened in the ignored splits, PDF++ will still open the backlink in the way specified in the previous setting. For example, you might want to ignore the left sidebar if you are pinning a certain note (e.g. daily note) in it.
ast.target: 如果某些笔记在被忽略的分割窗格中打开，PDF++仍将按照上一个设置中指定的方式打开反向链接。例如，如果您在左侧边栏中固定了某个笔记（如每日笔记），您可能希望忽略该侧边栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option will be ignored when you open a link in a tab in the same split as the current tab.
ast.target: 当您在与当前标签页相同的分割窗格中的标签页中打开链接时，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, all backlinks are highlighted. If this option is enabled, a backlink will be highlighted only when a color is specified in the link text.
ast.target: 默认情况下，所有反向链接都会被高亮显示。如果启用此选项，则仅当链接文本中指定了颜色时，反向链接才会被高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If no color is specified in link text, this color will be used.
ast.target: 如果链接文本中未指定颜色，则将使用此颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bounding rectangles will be shown for annotations with backlinks.
ast.target: 将为带有反向链接的注释显示边界矩形。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show icons for text selections, annotations, offsets and rectangular selections with backlinks.
ast.target: 为带有反向链接的文本选择、注释、偏移量和矩形选择显示图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, rectangular selection embeds are re-rendered every time you open the markdown file, which can slow down the loading time. Turn on this option to replace them with static images and improve the performance.
ast.target: 默认情况下，每次打开Markdown文件时都会重新渲染矩形选择嵌入，这可能会减慢加载速度。开启此选项可将其替换为静态图像，从而提高性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, rectangular selection embeds will be inverted in color when the "Adapt to theme" setting is enabled in the PDF toolbar. This will help you reduce eye strain in dark mode.
ast.target: 如果启用，当PDF工具栏中的“适应主题”设置启用时，矩形选择嵌入的颜色将被反转。这将有助于在深色模式下减轻眼睛疲劳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The higher the value, the better the rendering quality, but the longer time it takes to render. The default value is 100.
ast.target: 值越高，渲染质量越好，但渲染所需时间也越长。默认值为100。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the name of the color selected in the color palette will be included in the link text. As a result, the rectangular selection will be highlighted with the specified color in the PDF viewer.
ast.target: 启用后，调色板中所选颜色的名称将包含在链接文本中。因此，矩形选择将在PDF查看器中以指定颜色高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Not supported on smartphones) When enabled, the dropdown menus (⌄) in the PDF toolbar will be opened by hovering over the icon, and you don't need to click it.
ast.target: （不支持智能手机）启用后，PDF工具栏中的下拉菜单（⌄）将在鼠标悬停在图标上时打开，无需点击。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A input box will be added to the PDF toolbar, which indicated the current zoom level and allows you to set the zoom level by typing a number.
ast.target: 将在PDF工具栏中添加一个输入框，用于显示当前缩放级别，并允许您通过输入数字来设置缩放级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clicking a color while selecting a range of text will copy a link to the selection with "&color=..." appended.
ast.target: 在选择文本范围时点击颜色，将复制一个带有“&color=...”后缀的选择链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A color palette will be added to the toolbar of the PDF viewer.
ast.target: 将在PDF查看器的工具栏中添加一个调色板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This color will be selected in the color palette in a newly opened PDF viewer.
ast.target: 在新打开的PDF查看器中，此颜色将在调色板中被选中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify a different color for each color palette.
ast.target: 如果禁用，您可以为每个调色板指定不同的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.
ast.target: 在PDF嵌入中，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Desktop & tablet only) Customize the behavior of the context menu that pops up when you right-click in the PDF viewer. For mobile users, see also the next section.
ast.target: （仅限桌面和平板电脑）自定义在PDF查看器中右键单击时弹出的上下文菜单的行为。移动用户请参阅下一节。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can customize the display text format in the setting "Copied text foramt > Display text format" below.
ast.target: 您可以在下方的设置“复制文本格式 > 显示文本格式”中自定义显示文本格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize which menu items to show.
ast.target: 自定义要显示的菜单项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: "Search on Google Scholar": Available when right-clicking citation links in PDFs.
ast.target: “在Google Scholar上搜索”：在PDF中右键单击引用链接时可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Available when right-clicking with no text selected.
ast.target: 在未选择文本时右键单击可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to show the outline of a markdown file and a PDF file without key conflict.
ast.target: 开启此选项后，您可以使用相同的快捷键来显示Markdown文件和PDF文件的大纲，而不会发生按键冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enabling this will allow you to use the same hotkey to close the sidebar if it is already open.
ast.target: 启用此选项将允许您在侧边栏已打开时使用相同的快捷键将其关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to zoom in/out a PDF viewer or any other type of view without key conflict.
ast.target: 开启此选项后，您可以使用相同的快捷键来放大/缩小PDF查看器或任何其他类型的视图，而不会发生按键冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The template format that will be used when copying a link to a selection or an annotation in PDF viewer.
ast.target: 在PDF查看器中复制选择或注释的链接时将使用的模板格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify a different display text format for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.
ast.target: 如果禁用，您可以从PDF工具栏的下拉菜单中为每个PDF查看器指定不同的显示文本格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify a different action for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.
ast.target: 如果禁用，您可以从PDF工具栏的下拉菜单中为每个PDF查看器指定不同的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For example, you can use this to copy a link to the page when there is no selection.
ast.target: 例如，您可以使用此功能在没有选择时复制指向页面的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Speed up the process of copying & pasting PDF links to your notes with some automation. Note that you can't activate both of auto-focus and auto-paste at the same time.
ast.target: 通过一些自动化功能，加快将PDF链接复制并粘贴到笔记中的过程。请注意，您不能同时激活自动聚焦和自动粘贴。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the "Copy link to selection or annotation" command will be triggered automatically every time you select a range of text in a PDF viewer, meaning you don't even have to press a hotkey to copy a link.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次在PDF查看器中选择文本范围时，“复制选择或注释的链接”命令将自动触发，这意味着您甚至无需按快捷键即可复制链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
ast.target: 如果启用了下一个设置，您也可以通过左侧功能区菜单中的图标切换自动聚焦。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle this mode via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 您也可以通过命令切换此模式。更改此设置后请重新加载插件以使其生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, a markdown file will be focused automatically after copying a link to PDF text selection or annotation.
ast.target: 如果启用，在复制PDF文本选择或注释的链接后，Markdown文件将自动获得焦点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended if you prefer something less agressive than auto-paste. You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
ast.target: 如果您偏好比自动粘贴更温和的方式，推荐使用此选项。如果启用了下一个设置，您也可以通过左侧功能区菜单中的图标切换自动聚焦。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-focus via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 您也可以通过命令切换自动聚焦。更改此设置后请重新加载插件以使其生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the copied link to PDF text selection or annotation will be automatically pasted into a markdown file right after copying.
ast.target: 如果启用，复制的PDF文本选择或注释的链接将在复制后自动粘贴到Markdown文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-paste via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
ast.target: 如果启用了下一个设置，您也可以通过左侧功能区菜单中的图标切换自动粘贴。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-paste via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 您也可以通过命令切换自动粘贴。更改此设置后请重新加载插件以使其生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, auto-paste will focus on the editor after pasting.
ast.target: 如果启用，自动粘贴后将聚焦到编辑器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the text selection in the PDF viewer will be automatically cleared after performing auto-pasting.
ast.target: 启用后，在PDF查看器中执行自动粘贴操作后，文本选择将自动清除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, triggering auto-pasting will paste the copied text at the current cursor position if the target note is already opened. If disabled, the text will be always appended to the end of the note.
ast.target: 启用后，如果目标笔记已打开，触发自动粘贴会将复制的文本粘贴到当前光标位置。如果禁用，文本将始终追加到笔记末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Because you disabled the option above, auto-pasted content will be added at the end of your note. Enable this option to make sure that you have a blank line between the existing content and the newly added content.
ast.target: 由于您禁用了上述选项，自动粘贴的内容将添加到笔记末尾。启用此选项可确保现有内容与新添加内容之间有一个空行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: General settings that apply to both auto-focus and auto-paste.
ast.target: 适用于自动聚焦和自动粘贴的通用设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option will not affect the behavior of Hover Editor outside of PDF++.
ast.target: 此选项不会影响PDF++之外的悬停编辑器行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After auto-pasting into a markdown file opened in the left or right sidebar, the sidebar will be automatically collapsed once it loses focus.
ast.target: 在左侧或右侧边栏中打开的Markdown文件中自动粘贴后，一旦边栏失去焦点，它将自动折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option can be useful especially when you set the previous option to "Hover Editor".
ast.target: 当您将前一个选项设置为“悬停编辑器”时，此选项尤其有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When PDF++ cannot determine which markdown file to focus on or paste to, it will execute the command specified in the next option to let you pick a target file.
ast.target: 当PDF++无法确定要聚焦或粘贴到哪个Markdown文件时，它将执行下一个选项中指定的命令，让您选择目标文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The link will be auto-pasted into the first markdown file that you open within this time frame after the command is executed. If you don't open any markdown file during this time, the auto-paste will not occur. This option is not related to auto-focus.
ast.target: 链接将自动粘贴到您在命令执行后此时间范围内打开的第一个Markdown文件中。如果在此期间您没有打开任何Markdown文件，则不会发生自动粘贴。此选项与自动聚焦无关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates a new note and opens it in a new pane specified in the "How to open target markdown file when not opened" option.
ast.target: 创建一个新笔记，并在“未打开时如何打开目标Markdown文件”选项指定的新窗格中打开它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Note that turning on this option disables text selection in the annotation popup (e.g. modified date, author, etc).
ast.target: 请注意，启用此选项会禁用注释弹出窗口（例如，修改日期、作者等）中的文本选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the same behavior as the PDF viewers of some web browsers (e.g. Chrome/Firefox). You may have to reopen the PDF file after changing this option.
ast.target: 这与某些网络浏览器（例如Chrome/Firefox）的PDF查看器行为相同。更改此选项后，您可能需要重新打开PDF文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can turn this on and off with the toggle button in the PDF viewer toolbar.
ast.target: 您可以通过PDF查看器工具栏中的切换按钮来开启和关闭此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify whether to write highlights to files for each PDF viewer.
ast.target: 如果禁用，您可以为每个PDF查看器指定是否将高亮写入文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can edit the text contents of annotations embedded in PDF files by clicking the "Edit" button in the annotation popup.
ast.target: 如果启用，您可以通过点击注释弹出窗口中的“编辑”按钮来编辑嵌入在PDF文件中的注释文本内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can delete annotations embedded in PDF files by clicking the "Delete" button in the annotation popup.
ast.target: 如果启用，您可以通过点击注释弹出窗口中的“删除”按钮来删除嵌入在PDF文件中的注释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make it easier to work with internal links embedded in PDF files.
ast.target: 使处理嵌入在PDF文件中的内部链接更加容易。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, clicking the "navigate back" (left arrow) button will take you back to the page you were originally viewing before clicking on an internal link in the PDF file.
ast.target: 启用后，点击“后退”（左箭头）按钮将带您回到点击PDF文件中内部链接之前正在查看的页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Running this command while viewing a PDF file will copy a link, clicking which will open the PDF file at the current scroll position and zoom level.
ast.target: 在查看PDF文件时运行此命令将复制一个链接，点击该链接将在当前滚动位置和缩放级别打开PDF文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Requires custom context menu & PDF editing enabled) After copying a link by the above actions, you can "paste" it to a selection in PDF to create a PDF internal link. To do this, right-click the selection and click "Paste copied link to selection".
ast.target: （需要启用自定义上下文菜单和PDF编辑）通过上述操作复制链接后，您可以将其“粘贴”到PDF中的选区以创建PDF内部链接。为此，请右键单击选区并点击“将复制的链接粘贴到选区”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify whether PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection" should be surrounded by borders.
ast.target: 指定通过“将复制的链接粘贴到选区”创建的PDF内部链接是否应带有边框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the border color of PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection".
ast.target: 指定通过“将复制的链接粘贴到选区”创建的PDF内部链接的边框颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make it easier to work with external links embedded in PDF files.
ast.target: 使处理嵌入在PDF文件中的外部链接更加容易。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: General settings for the PDF sidebar. The options specific to the outline and thumbnails are located in the corresponding sections below.
ast.target: PDF侧边栏的通用设置。特定于大纲和缩略图的选项位于下面的相应部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires reopening the tabs after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后需要重新打开标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reopen PDFs after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后请重新打开PDF文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Power up the outline view of the built-in PDF viewer: add, rename, or delete items via the right-click menu and the "Add to outline" command, drag & drop items to insert a section link, and more.
ast.target: 增强内置PDF查看器的大纲视图：通过右键菜单和“添加到大纲”命令添加、重命名或删除项目，拖放项目以插入章节链接，等等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reopen tabs or reload the app after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后需要重新打开标签页或重新加载应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This enables you to insert a section link with a custom format by right-clicking an item in the outline. Moreover, you will be able to add, rename, or delete outline items if PDF modification is enabled.
ast.target: 这使您能够通过右键单击大纲中的项目来插入具有自定义格式的章节链接。此外，如果启用了PDF修改，您将能够添加、重命名或删除大纲项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Grab an item in the outline and drop it to a markdown file to insert a section link. Changing this option requires reopening the tabs or reloading the app.
ast.target: 抓取大纲中的一个项目并将其拖放到Markdown文件中以插入章节链接。更改此选项需要重新打开标签页或重新加载应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can copy PDF outline as a markdown list or headings using the commands "Copy outline as markdown list" and "Copy outline as markdown headings".
ast.target: 您可以使用“将大纲复制为Markdown列表”和“将大纲复制为Markdown标题”命令将PDF大纲复制为Markdown列表或标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You don't need to include leading hyphens in the template.
ast.target: 您不需要在模板中包含前导连字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You don't need to include leading hashes in the template.
ast.target: 您不需要在模板中包含前导井号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The copied headings will start at this level.
ast.target: 复制的标题将从此级别开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This enables you to copy a page link with a custom display text format specified in the PDF toolbar by right-clicking a thumbnail. Moreover, you will be able to insert, delete, extract pages if PDF modification is enabled.
ast.target: 这使您能够通过右键单击缩略图来复制具有在PDF工具栏中指定的自定义显示文本格式的页面链接。此外，如果启用了PDF修改，您将能够插入、删除、提取页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the newly created PDF file will be opened after running the commands "Extract this page to a new file" or "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".
ast.target: 如果启用，在运行“将此页面提取为新文件”或“在此页面将此PDF分为两个文件”命令后，新创建的PDF文件将被打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to the commands "Insert page before/after this page".
ast.target: 适用于“在此页面之前/之后插入页面”命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to the command "Delete this page".
ast.target: 适用于“删除此页面”命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to the commands "Extract this page to a new file" and "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".
ast.target: 适用于“将此页面提取为新文件”和“在此页面将此PDF分为两个文件”命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option will be ignored when you open a PDF link in a tab in the same split as the PDF viewer.
ast.target: 当您在与PDF查看器相同的拆分窗格中的标签页中打开PDF链接时，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you open a link to a PDF file that's already opened, Obsidian's default behavior causes the zoom level to be reset to fit the width of the PDF file to the viewer. If enabled, the current zoom level will be preserved. This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.
ast.target: 当您打开一个已经打开的PDF文件的链接时，Obsidian的默认行为会导致缩放级别重置为适合查看器宽度的PDF文件。如果启用，当前缩放级别将被保留。此选项在PDF嵌入中将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Obsidian lets you specify the height of a PDF embed by appending "&height=..." to a link, and this also applies to popover previews. Enable this option if you want to ignore the height parameter in popover previews.
ast.target: Obsidian允许您通过在链接后附加“&height=...”来指定PDF嵌入的高度，这也适用于弹出窗口预览。如果您想在弹出窗口预览中忽略高度参数，请启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Double-clicking a PDF embed will open the embedded file.
ast.target: 双击PDF嵌入将打开嵌入的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regardless of the "two page" layout setting in existing PDF viewer, PDF embeds and PDF popover previews will be always displayed in "single page" layout. You can still turn it on for each embed by clicking the "two page" button in the toolbar, if shown.
ast.target: 无论现有PDF查看器中的“双页”布局设置如何，PDF嵌入和PDF弹出窗口预览将始终以“单页”布局显示。如果工具栏中显示了“双页”按钮，您仍然可以为每个嵌入单独开启它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After changing this option, you need to reopen tabs or reload the app.
ast.target: 更改此选项后，您需要重新打开标签页或重新加载应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can toggle this on and off with the "Show only backlinks in the current page" button at the top right of the backlinks pane.
ast.target: 您可以通过反向链接窗格右上角的“仅显示当前页面中的反向链接”按钮来开启和关闭此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned off, only backlinks to specific text selections, annotations or locations will be shown when filtering the backlinks page by page.
ast.target: 如果关闭，在按页筛选反向链接页面时，将仅显示指向特定文本选择、注释或位置的反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hovering your mouse over highlighted text or annotation will also highlight the corresponding item in the backlink pane.
ast.target: 将鼠标悬停在高亮文本或注释上也会在反向链接窗格中高亮显示相应的项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In the backlinks pane, hover your mouse over an backlink item to highlight the corresponding text or annotation in the PDF viewer. This option requires reopening or switching tabs to take effect.
ast.target: 在反向链接窗格中，将鼠标悬停在反向链接项目上以在PDF查看器中高亮显示相应的文本或注释。此选项需要重新打开或切换标签页才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To add a new color, click the "+" button in the "highlight colors" setting above.
ast.target: 要添加新颜色，请点击上方“高亮颜色”设置中的“+”按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open PDF links with the OS-defined default application for PDF files.
ast.target: 使用操作系统为PDF文件定义的默认应用程序打开PDF链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the same PDF file both in the default app and Obsidian at the same time.
ast.target: 同时在默认应用程序和Obsidian中打开同一个PDF文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you focus on a PDF file in Obsidian, the external app will also focus on the same file.
ast.target: 当您在Obsidian中聚焦于一个PDF文件时，外部应用程序也会聚焦于同一个文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Otherwise, the focus will be moved to the external app.
ast.target: 否则，焦点将转移到外部应用程序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place newly created dummy PDF files in this folder.
ast.target: 将新创建的虚拟PDF文件放置在此文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If your file is under "vault/folder", and you set subfolder name to "attachments", dummy PDF files will be saved to "vault/folder/attachments".
ast.target: 如果您的文件位于“vault/folder”下，并且您将子文件夹名称设置为“attachments”，则虚拟PDF文件将保存到“vault/folder/attachments”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the URI pattens for PDFs in regular expressions. When dragging and dropping a URI/URL from your browser to Obsidian's editor, it will be used to check if the destination file is a PDF file. If you need multiple patterns, separate them with a new line.
ast.target: 使用正则表达式指定PDF的URI模式。当从浏览器拖放URI/URL到Obsidian的编辑器时，将使用此模式检查目标文件是否为PDF文件。如果需要多个模式，请用换行符分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reopen the PDF viewers after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后，请重新打开PDF查看器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: They are used preferentially from left to right, so you might want to put the easier-to-reach keys first. This is the same as Tridactyl's "hintchars" option.
ast.target: 它们从左到右优先使用，因此您可能希望将更容易按到的键放在前面。这与Tridactyl的“hintchars”选项相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Space-separated list of "link"/"annot"/"backlink" or "all". Run ":help :hint" for the details.
ast.target: 以空格分隔的“link”/“annot”/“backlink”或“all”列表。运行“:help :hint”查看详情。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can use j/k/h/l keys, instead of the arrow keys, to navigate through context menu items in the PDF viewer.
ast.target: 如果启用，您可以使用j/k/h/l键（而非方向键）在PDF查看器的上下文菜单项中导航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The size of scroll when one of the jkhl keys is pressed once.
ast.target: 按下jkhl键一次时的滚动量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The speed of scroll when pressing and holding down the jkhl keys.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all matches will be highlighted.
ast.target: 如果启用，所有匹配项都将被高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Incremental search: while typing the search query, update the search results after every keystroke. If disabled, the results will be shown only after pressing Enter.
ast.target: 增量搜索：在输入搜索查询时，每次按键后更新搜索结果。如果禁用，则仅在按Enter键后显示结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, PDF++ will automatically check for updates every 24 hours and notify you if a new version is available.
ast.target: 如果启用，PDF++将每24小时自动检查更新，并在有新版本可用时通知您。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For example, when you copy a link to a text selection in a PDF file, the status "Link copied" will be displayed in the PDF toolbar.
ast.target: 例如，当您复制PDF文件中文本选择的链接时，PDF工具栏中将显示“链接已复制”状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The "Create new PDF" command will create a new PDF file in the location specified here.
ast.target: “创建新PDF”命令将在此处指定的位置创建一个新的PDF文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Newly created PDFs will appear under this folder.
ast.target: 新创建的PDF将显示在此文件夹下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Such whitespace can be introduced as a result of poor post-processing of OCR (optical character recognition). Enable this option to remove it when copying links to text selections.
ast.target: 此类空白可能是OCR（光学字符识别）后处理不佳的结果。启用此选项可在复制文本选择链接时将其移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Provide the "PATH" environment variable for PDF++ to run shell commands without the full paths specified. In MacOS and Linux, you can run "echo $PATH" in Terminal and then copy & paste the result here. Currently, it will be used only when you run ":!<command>" in Vim mode.
ast.target: 为PDF++提供“PATH”环境变量，以便在未指定完整路径的情况下运行shell命令。在MacOS和Linux中，您可以在终端中运行“echo $PATH”，然后将结果复制粘贴到此处。目前，它仅在您以Vim模式运行“:!<command>”时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can find more options in Style Settings > PDF++.
ast.target: 您可以在样式设置 > PDF++中找到更多选项。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从原始文件中移除页面？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folder to save the dummy files
ast.target: 保存虚拟文件的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在PDF查看器中高亮显示反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在PDF嵌入中高亮显示反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在画布中高亮显示反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Highlight backlinks in hover popover previews
ast.target: 在悬停弹出预览中高亮显示反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Action when hovering over highlighted text
ast.target: 悬停在高亮文本上时的操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Double click highlighted text to open the corresponding backlink
ast.target: 双击高亮文本以打开对应的反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How to open the markdown file when no markdown file is opened
ast.target: 当没有打开Markdown文件时，如何打开Markdown文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Always use sidebar to open markdown files from highlighted text
ast.target: 始终使用侧边栏从高亮文本打开Markdown文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Don't open multiple panes in sidebar
ast.target: 不要在侧边栏中打开多个窗格

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Don't move focus to markdown view after opening a backlink
ast.target: 打开反向链接后，不要将焦点移动到Markdown视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Highlight a backlink only if a color is specified
ast.target: 仅当指定了颜色时才高亮显示反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show bounding rectangles for backlinked annotations
ast.target: 为反向链接的批注显示边界矩形

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show icon for text selection with backlinks
ast.target: 为带有反向链接的文本选择显示图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show icon for annotation with backlinks
ast.target: 为带有反向链接的批注显示图标

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 为偏移反向链接显示图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show icon for rectangular selection backlinks
ast.target: 为矩形选择反向链接显示图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include the selected color's name when copying a link to a rectangular selection
ast.target: 复制矩形选择的链接时包含所选颜色的名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Zoom to fit rectangular selection when opening link
ast.target: 打开链接时缩放以适应矩形选择

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show color palette in the toolbar
ast.target: 在工具栏中显示调色板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show "without specifying color" button in the color palette
ast.target: 在调色板中显示“不指定颜色”按钮

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show color palette in PDF embeds as well
ast.target: 在PDF嵌入中也显示调色板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default color selected in color palette
ast.target: 调色板中默认选中的颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Share a single color among all color palettes
ast.target: 在所有调色板中共享单一颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Share the color with newly opened color palettes as well
ast.target: 与新打开的调色板也共享该颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 调色板中的安静工具提示

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use PageUp/PageDown key to go to previous/next page
ast.target: 使用PageUp/PageDown键转到上一页/下一页

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Replace the built-in context menu with PDF++'s custom menu
ast.target: 用PDF++的自定义菜单替换内置上下文菜单

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show context menu on tablet devices as well
ast.target: 在平板设备上也显示上下文菜单

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show the context menu right after selecting text when...
ast.target: 在...时，选择文本后立即显示上下文菜单

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Update color palette from context menu
ast.target: 从上下文菜单更新调色板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Action triggered by selecting "Copy" option on mobile devices
ast.target: 在移动设备上选择“复制”选项时触发的操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Set up hotkeys for copying links
ast.target: 为复制链接设置快捷键

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show outline: when the active file is not PDF, run the core Outline plugin's "Show outline" command
ast.target: 显示大纲：当活动文件不是PDF时，运行核心大纲插件的“显示大纲”命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show outline / show thumbnail: close the sidebar if it is already open
ast.target: 显示大纲/显示缩略图：如果侧边栏已打开则将其关闭

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Zoom in / zoom out: when the active file is not PDF, run the built-in "Zoom in" / "Zoom out" command
ast.target: 放大/缩小：当活动文件不是PDF时，运行内置的“放大”/“缩小”命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Zoom in / zoom out: when the active file is not PDF, run Font Size Adjuster's "Increment font size" / "Decrement font size" command
ast.target: 放大/缩小：当活动文件不是PDF时，运行字体大小调整器的“增加字体大小”/“减小字体大小”命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Property to associate a markdown file to a PDF file
ast.target: 将Markdown文件关联到PDF文件的属性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Share a single display text format among all PDF viewers
ast.target: 在所有PDF查看器中共享单一显示文本格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Share the display text format with newly opened PDF viewers as well
ast.target: 同时与新打开的PDF查看器共享显示文本格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default action when clicking on color palette
ast.target: 点击调色板时的默认操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Share a single action among all PDF viewers
ast.target: 在所有PDF查看器中共享单一操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Share the action with newly opened PDF viewers as well
ast.target: 同时与新打开的PDF查看器共享该操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use another template when no text is selected
ast.target: 未选中文本时使用其他模板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Link copy template used when no text is selected
ast.target: 未选中文本时使用的链接复制模板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show an icon to toggle auto-copy in the left ribbon menu
ast.target: 在左侧功能区菜单中显示切换自动复制的图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show an icon to toggle auto-focus in the left ribbon menu
ast.target: 在左侧功能区菜单中显示切换自动聚焦的图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Target markdown file to focus on

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show an icon to toggle auto-paste in the left ribbon menu
ast.target: 在左侧功能区菜单中显示切换自动粘贴的图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Target markdown file to paste links to
ast.target: 要粘贴链接的目标Markdown文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动粘贴后聚焦编辑器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动粘贴后清除文本选择

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Blank line above the appended content

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open target markdown file if not opened
ast.target: 如果目标Markdown文件未打开，则打开它

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How to open target markdown file when not opened
ast.target: 当目标Markdown文件未打开时如何打开

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Close Hover Editor when it loses focus
ast.target: 当悬浮编辑器失去焦点时关闭它

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-hide sidebar when it loses focus after auto-pasting
ast.target: 自动粘贴后侧边栏失去焦点时自动隐藏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Execute command when target file cannot be determined
ast.target: 当无法确定目标文件时执行命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: [Auto-paste] Maximum time to wait for the command to open the target file (sec)
ast.target: [自动粘贴] 等待命令打开目标文件的最长时间（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Drag & drop annotation popup to insert a link to the annotation
ast.target: 拖放标注弹窗以插入指向该标注的链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: If an annotation has a comment, show the annotation popup on hover
ast.target: 如果标注有评论，则在悬停时显示标注弹窗

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: description
ast.source: :0 - Go to the first page (same as :1)
ast.target: :0 - 跳转到第一页（与 :1 相同）

ast.name: description
ast.source: :go[to[page]] <page> - Go to the specified page. If the PDF has page labels, the argument is treated as a page label. Otherwise, it is treated as a page number.
ast.target: :go[to[page]] <page> - 跳转到指定页面。如果PDF有页面标签，参数将被视为页面标签。否则，将被视为页码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: :zoom <number> - Set the zoom level to <number> percent.
ast.target: :zoom <number> - 将缩放级别设置为 <number> 百分比。

ast.name: description
ast.target: :unm[ap] <key> - 在所有模式中取消 <key> 的映射。

ast.name: description
ast.target: :nun[map] <key> - 在普通模式中取消 <key> 的映射。

ast.name: description
ast.target: :vu[nmap] <key> - 在可视模式中取消 <key> 的映射。

ast.name: description
ast.target: :ou[nmap] <key> - 在大纲模式中取消 <key> 的映射。

ast.name: description
ast.source: :obcommand <command-id> - Execute the Obsidian command with the specified ID. Inspired by esm's awesome Vimrc Support plugin.
ast.target: :obcommand <command-id> - 执行指定ID的Obsidian命令。灵感来源于esm出色的Vimrc Support插件。
